description_long: This is a dark brown leather hat with a wide, flat brim and a flat-topped crown. The brim is octagonal, giving it a distinctive geometric appearance, and it extends outward evenly from the crown. Around the base of the crown, there is a medium-brown leather band adorned with small, evenly spaced gold rivets or grommets, adding a subtle decorative touch. The leather surface appears textured and slightly worn, suggesting durability and a rugged style. The hat is reminiscent of styles worn in the American West or by adventurers, making it suitable for both practical use and fashion. Its overall construction suggests it is sturdy yet comfortable for everyday urban wear.
description: A dark brown, wide-brimmed leather hat with a flat crown and a decorative brown band featuring gold rivets. The hat has a rugged, textured finish and an octagonal brim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat-topped crown, wide octagonal brim, and the brown band with gold rivets clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the crown and the continuation of the decorative band around the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crown and the full wrap of the brown band with gold rivets.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the hat's profile, the flatness of the brim, and the textured leather surface.
